title: TB6612FNG Dual H-Bridge PWM Motor Drive
design_question: Which motor driver provides bidirectional control for two DC gearmotors from a 3.3 V MCU?
selected_approach: TB6612FNG dual H-bridge (1.2 A continuous, 3.2 A peak). 20 kHz PWM above audible range. 3.3 V logic compatible.
rationale: TB6612FNG includes thermal shutdown, no external voltage drop issue (unlike L298N 2–3 V saturation loss). Two motors in one IC.

alternatives.reason_rejected: 2–3 V saturation drop; bulky; no current limit—rejected.

verification_notes: FACT: 'H-Bridge Motor Driver Circuit' confirms dead-time insertion and 20 kHz PWM above audible range.
supporting_fact_titles: DC Motor Speed Control via PWM
